extraction.one_line_summary: MOHORIČ attacked under 50km on Signal de Uchon debut climb, held off chasers while ROGLIČ lost 3+ minutes after early crashes.
tactical_patterns: POGAČAR infiltrated 29-rider break as race leader, unprecedented move forced rivals to chase entire stage exhausting support.
MOHORIČ launched winning move on Signal de Uchon's debut climb sub-50km, proving unfamiliar climbs favor aggressive specialists.
CARAPAZ late attack negated by MOVISTAR pacing down bonus seconds, revealing team interests conflicted with GC ambitions.
JUMBO-VISMA left ROGLIČ isolated losing 3+ minutes, indicating team already abandoning GC defense after early crashes.

rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: neutral: yellow jersey in 29-rider break forced UAE to miss breakaway coverage, risky but controlled green jersey threat
rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: positive: picked up 20 points in break extending green lead to 66, showing willingness to ride 249km tactically
rider_signals.MOHORIČ Matej: positive: redemption stage win after HAY crash disaster, attacked unfamiliar climb with confidence showing Bahrain morale intact
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: negative: lost 3+ minutes with zero teammates present, crashes degraded both form and team support structure
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: negative: strong attack nullified by Movistar chasing for MAS, revealing internal team GC hierarchy constraints
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: positive: chased bonus seconds despite being in yellow group, showing dual GC-stage ambitions
rider_signals.VAN DER POEL Mathieu: positive: actively chasing late despite yellow jersey, maintaining aggression on 249km stage
